outputs.description: The ID of the sample for which the report was downloaded Demisto.File File containing unfiltered result
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.ID

outputs.description: The VM ID for the sample ThreatGrid.Sample.VM.Name The VM Name for the sample
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.VM.ID

outputs.description: Start time of the analysis ThreatGrid.Sample.Runtime Runtime of the analysis
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.StartedAt

outputs.description: File name of the sample ThreatGrid.Sample.Size Size of the sample
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.FileName

outputs.description: The sample MD5 value ThreatGrid.Sample.SHA1 The sample's SHA-1 value
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.MD5

outputs.description: The sample's SHA-256 value ThreatGrid.Sample.MagicType Sample magic type
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.SHA256

outputs.description: Sample's file type ThreatGrid.Sample.ThreatScore The threat score of the sample
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.Type

outputs.description: The sample's heuristic score ThreatGrid.Sample.FilesDeleted The files that were created during the analysis
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.HeuristicScore

outputs.description: The files that were created during the analysis ThreatGrid.Sample.FilesModified The files that were modified during the analysis
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.FileCreated

outputs.description: The directory of the sample ThreatGrid.Sample.CMD The command line execution of the sample
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.Directory

outputs.description: The process name of the sample ThreatGrid.Sample.Destination The destination IP of the sample
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.ProcessName

outputs.description: The destination port of the sample ThreatGrid.Sample.PacketSize Packet size in bytes
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.DestinationPort

outputs.description: Sample malicious hits in VirusTotal ThreatGrid.Sample.VT.Engines Number of engines that scanned the Sample on VirusTotal
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Sample.VT.Hits

outputs.description: Artifact ID (yara signature name ThreatGrid.Artifact.Tags Artifact tags
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Artifact.Yara

outputs.description: Artifact family name ThreatGrid.Artifact.ThreatName Artifact threat name
outputs.name: ThreatGrid.Artifact.FamilyName
